articles.title: ServiceNow (@ServiceNow)
articles.content: People on X are the first to know. ServiceNow breaks down the walls—connecting any workflow, any AI, and any data source—to put AI to work for people. Your people team is running the same orientation conversation for the 50th time this quarter. What if they could focus on the conversations that actually build culture? That's not a tradeoff—that's. One hands-on experience where you'll meet your AI control tower and start putting it to work. AI specialists handle that instead—freeing your team to architect the systems, solve the hard problems, and build infrastructure that actually moves the business. Your operating model isn't.​ That's not a hunch. Here's what he told us—and what it means for anyone building with AI agents. AI that tells you what to do but doesn't do it is like a brain surgeon who hands you the scalpel with a list of instructions.

At #WSIS2026, UNITAR and @UPU\_UN signed a new MoU to advance inclusive digital government. Developed by @UEValencia in collaboration with UNITAR, the Master in International Leadership and Negotiation prepares participants to lead, negotiate and respond to complex global challenges. 🤔 What’s new in AI and international affairs? From 7 to 10 July, UNITAR will participate in the AI for Good Global Summit and the WSIS Forum 2026 in Geneva, engaging with industry experts, United Nations leaders, and partners.
